title: Vanilla+Trains
description: Makes Minecarts useful and a few more QoL addons
body:
## Does not work yet

### Difference to Vanilla
- [Useful Minecarts](https://modrinth.com/mod/cammies-minecart-tweaks)
- Optimization
- [prettier Villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)

### Reason to exist
- ease of Installation for my friends
- custom Modpack for my friends needs

#### Text about the modpack
This Modpack is mostly created for the ease of use when playing with friends.  
It [makes **Minecarts** useful](https://modrinth.com/mod/cammies-minecart-tweaks) and adds a few more Things like shrinking potions to the game.
To not see the same landscape for the 50000th hour, i also added [a mod to overhaul villages](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village).
For now the Modpack should remain **lightweight** and **not** very **gameplayaltering**. (but that might change in the future)
